Jose .

Industrial Engineer (completed) · Senior Full Stack .NET Developer · AI & Software Automation

🌐 Web ·
💼 LinkedIn ·
🐙 GitHub

English
 · 
Español

Industrial Engineer and Senior Full Stack Developer with more than 10 years of experience building web applications, REST APIs, mobile solutions and enterprise software.

Specialized in .NET, C#, React, TypeScript, SQL, MongoDB and modern Full Stack architectures. Passionate about software engineering, automation, artificial intelligence and continuous learning.

👋 About

• I started my professional career as an Industrial Engineer, working on projects related to energy efficiency, electrical systems, climate control and industrial installations.

• During those years, software development was initially a personal passion. Over time, that passion became my main profession and eventually led me to transition completely into software engineering.

• Today I work as a Senior .NET Full Stack Developer, participating in the analysis, design, development and maintenance of enterprise applications, REST APIs, web platforms and mobile solutions.

• My main technologies include C#, .NET, ASP.NET Core, React, TypeScript, SQL, MongoDB, Razor, Blazor, Unity and modern Full Stack architectures.

• Since 2023 I have incorporated Artificial Intelligence tools such as ChatGPT and Claude into real software development workflows.

✅ Availability

Open to new opportunities

I am open to new professional opportunities where I can add value through backend development and APIs, complemented by frontend work to build complete applications. If you think my profile could fit your team or project, I would be glad to talk with you.

🏢 Experience

E011 · Senior Full Stack .NET Developer — Grupo de Empresas Tecnológicas

Senior Full Stack .NET Developer

Grupo de Empresas Tecnológicas · Full-time · On-site

sept. 2020 - actualidad · 5 years 10 months

Location: Madrid, Spain

Within a group of technology companies, in the Software Engineering department, I perform the following tasks daily:

• Experience in the advanced use of Artificial Intelligence tools (since 2023) applied to software development, including Claude and ChatGPT, for Full Stack development acceleration, code generation and refactoring, architecture design, task automation, query optimization, technical documentation creation, debugging, and support in functional analysis processes. Ability to integrate AI into real development workflows, increasing productivity, code quality, and delivery speed in web projects, APIs, and mobile applications.

• Development and maintenance, as part of a multidisciplinary team, of a web application for the comprehensive management of measurement and calibration equipment. Participation in the analysis, development, and maintenance of modules for equipment inventory, calibration planning, maintenance control, and the generation of technical reports. Full Stack development with ASP.NET Core, C#, Razor, MVC, React, Vite, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, MongoDB, and RESTful APIs (JSON). Implementation of responsive interfaces, frontend/backend integration, user access control, and SQL query optimization.

• Development and maintenance, as part of a multidisciplinary team, of a mobile application for field data entry and validation in technical and inspection projects. Implementation of functionalities for data capture, information synchronization, dynamic form management, and real-time results visualization. Development using .NET, C#, Unity, RESTful APIs (JSON), and MongoDB. Participation in full-stack architecture design, backend service integration, and user experience enhancement in mobile environments.

• Participation in Agile Scrum environments, source code management with Git, and technical coordination via Microsoft Teams.

Skills: Inyección de dependencias, Desarrollo de Software, Gestión de equipos, Integración continua, Desarrollo web back end, Tecnología de la información, Docker, Desarrollo Full Stack, SQL, Capacidad analítica, Microservicios, Ingeniería industrial, C#, MongoDB, Colaboración interdisciplinaria, Depuración, Análisis de las partes interesadas, Aprendizaje permanente, Pruebas de software, JSON Web Token (JWT), Azure DevOps, Patrones de diseño, Comunicación, Análisis de requisitos, Computación en la nube, Ingeniería de Sistemas de Software, Autorización, OAuth, Microsoft Teams, Servicios web de RESTful, TypeScript, DevOps, Innovación tecnológica, Optimización de consultas, Desarrollo de aplicaciones móviles, Anthropic Claude, Mentoría, ChatGPT, HTML5, Prueba unitaria, Desarrollo multiplataforma, Powershell, React.js, Hojas de estilos en cascada (CSS), GitHub, Ingeniería de Prompts, Experiencia de Usuario (UX), Resolución de problemas, Inteligencia artificial, Tailwind CSS, Diseño web adaptable, Refactorización, Unity, Desarrollo web, Arquitectura de soluciones, Diseño de bases de datos, JavaScript, ASP.NET Web API, Liderazgo, Desarrollo de API, Desarrollo Front-End, Git, Desarrollo de base de datos, Pensamiento crítico, Aseguramiento de la calidad, Modelado de datos, Microsoft Azure, Optimización del rendimiento, Programación orientada a objetos (POO), ASP.NET MVC, Integración continua y entrega continua (CI/CD), Arquitectura de aplicación, Liderazgo de equipos, ASP.NET Core, Arquitectura de software, Metodologías ágiles, Scrum, Desarrollo de Aplicaciones, Diseño de Soluciones Tecnológicas, JSON, Autenticación, IA generativa, .NET Core, Gestión de proyectos

E010 · .NET Software Developer — Unisys

.NET Software Developer

Unisys · Full-time · On-site

jun. 2019 - sept. 2020 · 1 year 4 months

Location: Madrid, Spain

Within Unisys (initially contracted by the now-defunct company Xacom Comunicaciones), in the Software Engineering department, I performed the following tasks:

• Development and maintenance, as part of a multidisciplinary team, of a web application for the management and automatic issuance of drone pilot certificates for AENA (Spanish Airports and Air Navigation). Implementation of functionalities for pilot registration and validation, document management, automatic generation of digital certificates in PDF format, file querying, and information synchronization via RESTful APIs (JSON). Full Stack development using .NET, C#, ASP.NET, Blazor, Razor, and SQL. Participation in web architecture design, backend service integration, and user experience optimization in aeronautical management environments.

• Participation in Agile Scrum environments, source code management with Git, and technical coordination via Microsoft Teams.

Skills: Inyección de dependencias, Desarrollo de Software, Gestión de equipos, LINQ, Desarrollo web back end, Tecnología de la información, SQL, Capacidad analítica, Microservicios, Ingeniería industrial, C#, Colaboración interdisciplinaria, Depuración, Análisis de las partes interesadas, Aprendizaje permanente, Pruebas de software, JSON Web Token (JWT), Entity Framework (EF) Core, Patrones de diseño, Entity Framework, Comunicación, Análisis de requisitos, Computación en la nube, Ingeniería de Sistemas de Software, Microsoft Teams, Servicios web de RESTful, Innovación tecnológica, Optimización de consultas, Mentoría, HTML5, ASP.NET Razor, Prueba unitaria, Powershell, Hojas de estilos en cascada (CSS), GitHub, Experiencia de Usuario (UX), Resolución de problemas, Diseño web adaptable, Refactorización, Desarrollo web, Arquitectura de soluciones, Diseño de bases de datos, JavaScript, ASP.NET Web API, Liderazgo, Desarrollo de API, Desarrollo Front-End, Git, Desarrollo de base de datos, Pensamiento crítico, Aseguramiento de la calidad, Modelado de datos, Optimización del rendimiento, Programación orientada a objetos (POO), ASP.NET MVC, Integración continua y entrega continua (CI/CD), Arquitectura de aplicación, ASP.NET Core, Metodologías ágiles, Scrum, Desarrollo de Aplicaciones, Diseño de Soluciones Tecnológicas, JSON, Blazor, .NET Core, Gestión de proyectos

E009 · .NET Software Developer — IO Digital X

.NET Software Developer

IO Digital X · Full-time · On-site

sept. 2018 - jun. 2019 · 10 months

Location: Madrid, Spain

Within IO Digital X (later hired by Altare Web Services), in the Software Engineering department, I performed the following tasks:

• Development and maintenance, as part of a multidisciplinary team, of a web application for energy billing and commission management for Endesa's partners. Implementation of functionalities for calculating and tracking commissions, contract management, billing control, validation of commercial transactions, and real-time metrics visualization. Full Stack development using .NET, C#, ASP.NET, React, JavaScript, and SQL. Integration of RESTful APIs (JSON) for data synchronization and automation of processes related to commercial and energy management. Ongoing maintenance, performance optimization, and user experience improvement on enterprise management platforms.

• Participation in Agile Scrum environments, source code management with Git, and technical coordination via Microsoft Teams.

E008 · .NET Software Developer — INECO

.NET Software Developer

INECO · Full-time · On-site

feb. 2018 - sept. 2018 · 8 months

Location: Madrid, Spain

Within INECO (hired through the temporary employment agency ETT PERSONAL SIETE), in the Software Engineering department, I performed the following tasks:

• Development and maintenance, as part of a multidisciplinary team, of a web application for managing land designated for photovoltaic solar energy production within the AENA airport network. Implementation of functionalities for land inventory and location, file management, monitoring of photovoltaic installations, visualization of technical data, and document control associated with energy projects. Full Stack development using .NET, C#, ASP.NET, React, JavaScript, and SQL. Integration of RESTful APIs (JSON) for information synchronization and automation of processes related to energy planning and operation. Participation in web architecture design, performance optimization, and user experience improvement on technical and energy management platforms.

• Participation in Agile environm
